result.stdout:
Deterministic versioning and publishing for .NET monorepos.

Subcommands
  publish       p  Publishes changed projects to configured NuGet sources. Pipeline: discover → detect changes → build current → resolve base DLLs → compare → compute version → pack → push → tag.

Options
  --sources    -s  (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.
  --remote     -r  (Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.
  --tag-prefix -t  (Default: v) -- Prefix for version tags.

commands.payload:
Deterministic versioning and publishing for .NET monorepos.

Subcommands
  publish       p  Publishes changed projects to configured NuGet sources. Pipeline: discover → detect changes → build current → resolve base DLLs → compare → compute version → pack → push → tag.

Options
  --sources    -s  (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.
  --remote     -r  (Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.
  --tag-prefix -t  (Default: v) -- Prefix for version tags.

result.stdout:
Publishes changed projects to configured NuGet sources. Pipeline: discover → detect changes → build current → resolve base DLLs → compare → compute version → pack → push → tag.

Parameters
  --dry-run                 -d  (Default: False) -- Log actions without modifying the filesystem, Git state, or NuGet registries.
  --ignore-access-modifiers -i  (Default: False) -- Include internal member changes (for InternalsVisibleTo).
  --sign                    -s  (Default: ) -- Certificate fingerprint for signing .nupkg files before push.
  --rolling-branch          -r  (Default: latest) -- Branch pointer to force-update on release. Empty string disables.
  --api-key                 -a  (Default: ) -- API key for authenticated NuGet push operations.

Options
  --sources                 -s  (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.
  --remote                  -r  (Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.
  --tag-prefix              -t  (Default: v) -- Prefix for version tags.

commands.payload:
Publishes changed projects to configured NuGet sources. Pipeline: discover → detect changes → build current → resolve base DLLs → compare → compute version → pack → push → tag.

Parameters
  --dry-run                 -d  (Default: False) -- Log actions without modifying the filesystem, Git state, or NuGet registries.
  --ignore-access-modifiers -i  (Default: False) -- Include internal member changes (for InternalsVisibleTo).
  --sign                    -s  (Default: ) -- Certificate fingerprint for signing .nupkg files before push.
  --rolling-branch          -r  (Default: latest) -- Branch pointer to force-update on release. Empty string disables.
  --api-key                 -a  (Default: ) -- API key for authenticated NuGet push operations.

Options
  --sources                 -s  (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.
  --remote                  -r  (Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.
  --tag-prefix              -t  (Default: v) -- Prefix for version tags.
